Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorSellingTabMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.BagInset:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.BagListing, "TOPLEFT", -5, 5); self.BagInset:SetPoint("BOTTOMRIGHT", self.BagListing, "BOTTOMRIGHT", 0, -3); self.BuyFrame:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.BagListing, "TOPRIGHT", 10, 10)

Mixin(self, AuctionatorSaleItemMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.Icon:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMLEFT", -20, -5); self.UnitPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Icon, "TOPRIGHT", 0, 5); self.UnitPrice:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.Icon, "RIGHT", 330, 0); self.StackPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.UnitPrice, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, -25); self.StackPrice:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.UnitPrice, "RIGHT"); self.Stacks:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.StackPrice, "BOTTOMLEFT", 112, -30); self.Stacks:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.UnitPrice, "RIGHT"); self.Duration:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.UnitPrice, "TOPRIGHT"); self.Duration:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.UnitPrice, "RIGHT", 200, 0); self.PostButton:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Duration, "BOTTOMLEFT", 20, -19); self.SkipButton:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.PostButton, "TOPRIGHT"); self.PrevButton:SetPoint("TOPRIGHT", self.PostButton, "TOPLEFT"); self.BidPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.PostButton, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.Deposit:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Duration, "TOPRIGHT", 20, 0); self.DepositPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Deposit, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.Total:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DepositPrice, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.TotalPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Total, "BOTTOMLEFT")
Mixin(self, AuctionatorBuyFrameMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorBuyFrameMixinForSelling); self.HistoryButton:SetPoint("TOP", self.SearchResultsListing, "BOTTOM")
